messages.subject: [R-jobs] Lead R Developer / Sr Statistical Programmer (Full-time, Menlo Park, CA, USA)
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Lead R Developer / Sr Statistical Programmer (Full-time, Menlo Park, CA, USA)
messages.body_plain:
Hello fellow R users & developers!

I'm looking to hire a Lead R Developer
<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ZatWPXuH1nkwuAEKU1WPVCk0rIcEH_l5WHlOjeq6T-c/>
to build and maintain the internal analytics (R) stack as we grow the
statistical modeling capabilities of our Data Science team. This position
is expected to be local, but we might make exceptions for exceptional
candidates.

Please review the job description at https://goo.gl/2FT8pz and feel free to
respond via e-mail if the opportunity excites you.

Best wishes,

Ajay

-- 
*Ajay Gopal, PhD <https://www.linkedin.com/in/ajaykumargopal>
<https://twitter.com/aj2z>*
*VP, Data Science*
*Tel: +1 310 570 2529*

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

messages.subject: [R-jobs] postdoctoral position in Computational Biology/Statistics/Evolutionary Biology in Madrid, Spain
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] postdoctoral position in Computational Biology/Statistics/Evolutionary Biology in Madrid, Spain
messages.body_plain:
Dear All,

A 1-year postdoctoral position in Computational
Biology/Bioinformatics/Evol. Biology/Statistics is available in Madrid, Spain.


Brief description: Simulation and analysis of evolutionary processes in
cancer.


Requirements:

- Postdoc younger than 30 years.

- Be registered as resident ("estar empadronado") in Madrid, Spain, since
  08-August-2016.

- Be registed in the "Fichero del Sistema Nacional de Garant?a Juvenil"
  (http://www.empleo.gob.es/es/garantiajuvenil/accesoJovenes.html).

- Full details of requirements are available, in Spanish, at
  http://www.madrimasd.org/uploads/documents/bases_reguladoras_en_bocm_contratos_pre_y_post_pej.pdf).

  Further information is available from the official resolution from:
  https://www.bocm.es/boletin/CM_Orden_BOCM/2017/01/16/BOCM-20170116-4.PDF

- Ideally, candidates should have experience with R (and possibly also C++
  programming) and be interested in at least some of the areas dealt with
  in the project (evolutionary biology, statistics, computational biology).


Procedure:

- Given that the deadlines are extremely tight I'd suggest interested
  candidates to contact me directly (ramon.diaz at iib.uam.es or
  rdiaz02 at gmail.com) as soon as possible.



Best,

R.

-- 
Ramon Diaz-Uriarte
Department of Biochemistry, Lab B-25
Facultad de Medicina
Universidad Aut?noma de Madrid 
Arzobispo Morcillo, 4
28029 Madrid
Spain

Phone: +34-91-497-2412

Email: rdiaz02 at gmail.com
       ramon.diaz at iib.uam.es

http://ligarto.org/rdiaz
